data.title: MKBHD's Smartphone Of The Year 2024 Is Here, And Apple Fans Won't Be Happy
data.description: Marques Brownlee named the Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra as his Smartphone of the Year 2024 for its all-around excellence, outshining competitors like the iPhone 16 and Google Pixel 9 Pro Fold across multiple categories.

data.title: Elon Musk's Robotaxi Ambitions Are Sending TSLA Stock Soaring: Could Tesla Have More Cybercab Models Planned For 2025?
data.description: Tesla's chief designer Franz von Holzhausen hinted at the possibility of introducing new vehicle forms for the company's robotaxi lineup.

data.title: Gordon Johnson Revives Charlie Munger's Criticism Of Bitcoin As 'Rat Poison,' Calls It 'Worthless' With BTC Falling Below $100,000: 'Purely Speculative Tulip That's In A Bubble'
data.description: GLJ Research CEO Gordon Johnson intensified criticism of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) on Thursday, echoing late Berkshire Hathaway Inc. Vice Chairman Charlie Munger‘s skepticism and targeting major financial institutions for their role in crypto

data.title: Nike's New CEO Blames Promotions For Declining Profits, Says Turnaround Efforts May Hurt As Company Moves To Clear Excess Inventory: 'We Lost Our Obsession With Sport'
data.description: After Nike beat Q2 estimates, its new CEO Elliot Hill rebuked his predecessor's strategies and said it was not maximizing its strengths.
